zh.Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Englan: 英國諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia de Markham於大約1254年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓時，她的父親Robert de Markham25歲，母親Sarah de Snitterton35歲。她於大約1277年與Thomas de Bekering III結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1318年享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia de Markham于大约1254年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓时，她的父亲Robert de Markham25岁，母亲Sarah de Snitterton35岁。她于大约1277年与Thomas de Bekering III结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1318年享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Markham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Markham Clinton or East Markham (Nottinghamshire). The placename derives from Old English mearc ‘mark, boundary’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

Irish: English surname used as an equivalent of Gaelic Ó Marcacháin ‘descendant of Marcachán’, a diminutive of Marcach ‘horseman, rider’ (see Markey ). This was originally a Galway surname but is now found mainly in Clare, sometimes translated into English as Ryder .

variants.name: Markey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Donovan, Fergal.
Irish (Monaghan): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Marcaigh ‘descendant of Marcach’, a name meaning ‘horseman, knight’, from marc ‘horse’. Compare Markham 2.
English: apparently from a placename meaning ‘boundary river’ in Old or Middle English, but no such place has been identified.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia de Markham was born about 1254, in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Robert de Markham, was 25 and her mother, Sarah de Snitterton, was 35. She married Thomas de Bekering III about 1277. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1318, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia de Markham est née environ 1254, à Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Markham, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Snitterton, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Bekering III environ 1277. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1318, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia de Markham um 1254 in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Markham 25 und ihre Mutter Sarah de Snitterton 35. Sie hat um 1277 Thomas de Bekering III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1318 im Alter von 65 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Markham è nata il circa 1254 nel Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Markham, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Sarah de Snitterton, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Bekering III circa 1277. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1318, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Markhamが約1254年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Markhamは25歳，母Sarah de Snittertonは35歳であった。約1277年にThomas de Bekering IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1318年に65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Markham(이)가 대략 1254년 영국 노틴그함실르 마카 클린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Markham(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah de Snitterton(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1277년 Thomas de Bekering III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1318년 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Markham nasceu aproximadamente 1254, em Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Markham, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Snitterton, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Bekering III aproximadamente 1277. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1318, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia de Markham родилась около 1254 г. в местности мархам клинтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Markham было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Snitterton, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Bekering III около 1277 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1318 г. в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia de Markham nació aproximadamente 1254, en Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Markham, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Sarah de Snitterton, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Thomas de Bekering III aproximadamente 1277. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1318, a la edad de 65 años.
